title: viola × holmiana
intro: Viola × holmiana, also known as the hybrid violet, is a plant species that is a cross between Viola lactea and Viola sororia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Viola × holmiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
